content.intro: The Tenancies section is where you manage all your rental agreements. Here you can track draft tenancies awaiting move-in, active tenancies, and those with notice served.

sections.title: Tenancy Tabs
sections.content: The Tenancies page has three main tabs: 'Draft' (tenancies awaiting move-in, shown in amber), 'Active' (currently occupied properties, shown in green), and 'Notice Served' (tenancies where notice has been given, shown in red). Each tab shows a count of tenancies in that status.

steps.title: Use the search bar
steps.content: Type in the search box to find tenancies by tenant name, property address, or landlord name.

steps.title: Filter by tab
steps.content: Click the Draft, Active, or Notice Served tabs to see only tenancies in that status.

steps.title: Filter unprotected deposits
steps.content: Click the filter badge to show only tenancies with unprotected deposits.

sections.title: Draft Tenancies
sections.content: Draft tenancies are created when you convert a completed reference. They show the pending move-in date and allow you to: request initial monies, generate a tenancy agreement, change the move-in date, and complete the move-in process.

sections.title: Active Tenancies
sections.content: Active tenancies are properties currently being rented. From an active tenancy you can: view deposit protection status, generate rent increase notices, process tenant changes, serve Section 8 notices, end the tenancy, and email tenants.

sections.title: Expand for Details
sections.content: Click on any tenancy row to expand it and see more details, including tenant information, agreement status, and available actions.
